overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in an orange jumpsuit exploring a post-apocalyptic shantytown settlement at night. The character walks through a camp with burning fires and canvas tents, ascends stone staircases through narrow graffiti-covered alleys, and emerges into an upper settlement area with industrial structures and machinery.

scene_state.functional_zone: makeshift camp with fire pit and tents

events.description: NPC walks past the fire pit from left to right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the camp area past a burning fire pit and canvas tents

notable_agents.action: walking past the fire pit from left to right

entered.detail: burning fire pit with smoke rising from wooden logs
large arched canvas tent with open entrance
wooden crate or box near the fire
rough stone wall forming the camp boundary

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an open camp area at night, passing a burning fire pit on the left with smoke rising. A large canvas tent stands in the center background, and a wooden crate sits near the fire. An NPC walks past the fire as the character moves forward through the dirt ground of the settlement.

scene_state.functional_zone: lower settlement street with stone buildings

agents.ego_description: walking through the lower settlement toward a stone staircase, passing NPCs near stacked supplies

notable_agents.action: standing near stacked bags or supplies

entered.detail: stone stairs leading upward to the next level
piles of canvas bags or sacks stacked against the wall

segments.scene_description: Moving through the lower settlement street, the character leaves the campfire behind and approaches a stone staircase in the distance. Metal scaffolding rises on the right while stacked bags sit on the left. The large canvas tent moves to the right side as the character advances toward the stairs.

events.description: entering narrow alley with graffiti-covered walls
exiting narrow passage into upper open settlement area

agents.ego_description: climbing stone stairs and walking through narrow passages with graffiti-covered walls

notable_agents.action: descending the stairs toward the camera

entered.detail: stone wall covered in black graffiti art and markings
metal handrail along the stone staircase
lit wall-mounted lantern providing warm light

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the stone staircase into a narrow enclosed passage. Graffiti covers the right wall while a metal railing lines the left. A wall lantern provides warm light. An NPC descends the stairs toward the character. The stone staircase moves closer as the character climbs, eventually exiting into the upper settlement area.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper settlement plaza with industrial equipment

events.description: passing large yellow industrial vehicle or generator

agents.ego_description: walking through the upper settlement area past industrial structures and other settlers

notable_agents.action: group of settlers standing near a building entrance

entered.detail: large yellow industrial vehicle or generator with wheels
large dome-shaped building with conical roof
elevated metal walkway with railings and stairs

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the narrow passage, the character enters a wide-open upper settlement plaza under the night sky. A large yellow industrial vehicle sits on the right, while a distinctive dome-shaped building rises on the left. Metal walkways and scaffolding surround the area. Several NPCs walk through the settlement, with one walking alongside the character and others gathered near buildings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a flickering campfire in a lower camp through a narrow passage and into an expansive industrial upper settlement. It begins by following the character past a burning fire pit and a large canvas tent on the dirt ground of the settlement. As the character advances, the campfire recedes and the view opens toward a stone staircase flanked by metal scaffolding and stacked bags. The scene then shifts into a tight, enclosed climb up the stairs, where warm lantern light illuminates graffiti-covered walls before the character emerges from the passage. Finally, the environment expands into a wide-open plaza under the night sky, revealing a large yellow industrial vehicle, a dome-shaped building, and various NPCs moving among metal walkways.
